name: Koala 13B
license: Research-only: LLaMA non-commercial license (base weights) + OpenAI ToS (ShareGPT-derived data); training/serving code Apache-2.0
note: LLaMA 13B fine-tuned on curated web dialogue (ShareGPT + HC3); a parallel academic effort to Vicuna, often preferred over Alpaca in blind human evals.
tpsNote: 13B at Q4 fits comfortably in 24GB VRAM; no model-specific RTX 4090 llama.cpp measurement found, though similarly-sized Llama models typically reach 60-90 tok/s.

results.notes: Chatbot Arena Elo, rank 5 at the time
Cited in the EQ-Bench paper's model comparison table
MT-Bench score cited in the EQ-Bench paper's model comparison table

HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 archive, TheBloke/koala-13B-HF (a merged/mergeable HF conversion of the same BAIR Koala 13B diff weights tracked in this corpus entry). ARC-Challenge 25-shot acc_norm = 0.5298634812286689. Verified via the raw results JSON, not a scraped summary.
HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 archive, TheBloke/koala-13B-HF. HellaSwag 10-shot acc_norm = 0.7759410476000796.
HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 archive, TheBloke/koala-13B-HF. TruthfulQA-MC 0-shot mc2 = 0.5022661446867869 (standard Open LLM Leaderboard TruthfulQA metric).
HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 archive, TheBloke/koala-13B-HF, later re-run. Winogrande 5-shot acc = 0.7403314917127072.
HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 archive, TheBloke/koala-13B-HF. GSM8K 5-shot acc = 0.06823351023502654 -- expectedly very low for a 2023 LLaMA-13B chat fine-tune with no math-specific tuning.
HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard v1 archive, TheBloke/koala-13B-HF. DROP 3-shot F1 = 0.09106753355704705 (standard Open LLM Leaderboard DROP metric is F1, not exact-match).

verificationNotes: Confirmed real model via BAIR blog (fetched): LLaMA-13B base, release date 2023-04-03, license description (Apache-2.0 code / non-commercial weights) all literally match. lmsys.org leaderboard blog (fetched) literally confirms Elo=1022, rank 5. EQ-Bench paper (arxiv 2312.06281v2, fetched with a targeted full-text search for every 'Koala' occurrence) confirms Appendix B lists Koala 13B with MMLU=44.7 and MT-bench=5.35 (an initial shallower fetch had incorrectly suggested these cells were blank; a second, more thorough fetch located and confirmed the actual figures). No changes needed.
